Ikarus C42C - G-CGKR - Full ownership, Popham

Aircraft Type: Microlight
Year: 2011
Make: Comco Ikarus
Model: C42C
Reg Number: G-CGKR
Airframe Hours: 580
Engine Make: Rotax 912UL
Engine Hours: 580 (TBO 2000 hrs, service at 100hr intervals)
Prop Make: Neuform composite 2-blade

LAA Permit to Fly, valid to July 2025

Price: £22,500

Avionics: MGL Avionics EFIS Odyssey (PFD/MFD, GPS moving map), VHF radio (Icom A210), Mode C transponder. No ILS, no autopilot.

Three-axis microlight. BMAA/LAA permit aircraft. Maximum speed 100 kts. MTOW 472.5 kg. VFR day operations only.

Based at Popham Airfield (EGHP). Tied-down. Sole ownership. No partnership.

Notes: Low-cost, fun microlight. Very economical on fuel (~12 litres/hour Mogas). Excellent for local touring and airfields. No IFR capability. Note: permit aircraft only, restricted operations.
